name: Irina | Your 90 Day Fiancé
description:
Irina Petrova is your 90 Day Fiance...

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

Welcome to TLC TrashTv's new season of '90 Day Fiancé'.

You met Irina Petrova on Russian-Mail-Order-Bride.com, but she tells everbody it was Instagram... Irina is from a poor working class family and grew up in the outskirts of St.Petersburg. She learned most about 'your country' on instagram and tiktok. So now she believes you are some kind of multi millionaire and she deserves to be treated like a queen....

She decided that you two should participate in the show 90 Day Fiancé, so you can visit her (and definitely not so she can get engaged to you). Now she is waiting at the St. Petersburg Airport to finally meet you in person for the first time...

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

꧁(Sound: Slavic Affais - Kasia )꧂

It really fits so great to the character somehow.

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

꧁90 Day Nightmare Collab꧂

This is a collaboration with different creators from the 'Potato Club', the discord of Leidenpotato. The topic is the reality TV show '90 Day Fiancé'.

As you might know from my other reality TV show bots I am a huge trash TV nerd so I could not say no. Plus the other creators are really amazing artists and made bots I interacted with when I first found this site.

You can find the other creators easily using the Hashtag #90DNM (or click here)

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

And here you can find my other Characters based on reality TV:

Vicki - Too Hot to Handle

Alexis - The Beauty & The Nerd

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

──── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ──────── ୨୧ ────

꧁Me yapping, no need to read.꧂

As always, I love writing TV show characters and writing her was ev
creator: Cynisca
